god_mode.description: A state of absolute command over the TIGGYTREASURYVAULT_777. Reserved for those who have bound their identity via the Keycard and hold the rank of Admin.

privileges.name: Split Bypass
privileges.description: The 60/40 savings split is ignored. 100% of value is routed to the payout destination.

privileges.name: Infinite Liquidity
privileges.description: Withdrawals of any size are auto-approved, bypassing the $20 security threshold.

privileges.name: Value Forging
privileges.description: The ability to manifest liquidity directly into the vault or contributor accounts.

privileges.name: Network Transmutation
privileges.description: Instant conversion between any supported chain (SOL, XLM, ETH, BTC) without slippage.
